mapper.select:
SELECT CODE , RTRIM(CODE_NAME) CODE_NAME , DATE_FORMAT(START_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') START_DATE , DATE_FORMAT(END_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') END_DATE, USE_YN FROM T_COMM_MST WHERE 1=1
AND ( CODE LIKE CONCAT('%',#{code},'%') OR CODE_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{code},'%') )
ORDER BY CODE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_COMM_MST (CODE , CODE_NAME , START_DATE , END_DATE , USE_YN , REG_ID , REG_DTM , MOD_ID , MOD_DTM ) VALUES (#{code}, #{code_name}, #{start_date}, #{end_date}, #{use_yn}, 'admin', now(), 'admin', now() )
mapper.update: UPDATE T_COMM_MST SET CODE_NAME = #{code_name}, END_DATE = #{end_date}, USE_YN = #{use_yn}, MOD_ID = 'admin' , MOD_DTM = now() WHERE CODE = #{code}
UPDATE T_COMM_MST SET USE_YN = 'N', END_DATE = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), MOD_ID = 'admin', MOD_DTM = now() WHERE CODE = #{code}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_COMM_MST_DTL (CODE, DTL_CODE, DTL_CODE_NM, START_DATE, END_DATE, USE_YN, SORT, REG_ID, REG_DTM, MOD_ID, MOD_DTM ) VALUES (#{code}, #{dtl_code}, #{dtl_code_nm}, #{start_date}, #{end_date}, #{use_yn}, #{sort}, 'admin', now(), 'admin', now() )
mapper.update: UPDATE T_COMM_MST_DTL SET DTL_CODE_NM = #{dtl_code_nm}, END_DATE = #{end_date}, USE_YN = #{use_yn}, SORT = #{sort}, MOD_DTM = now() , MOD_ID = 'admin' WHERE CODE = #{code} AND DTL_CODE = #{dtl_code}
UPDATE T_COMM_MST_DTL SET USE_YN = 'N' SORT = #{sort}, END_DATE = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), MOD_ID = 'admin', MOD_DTM = now() WHERE CODE = #{code} AND DTL_CODE = #{dtl_code}
